name: Newmac Resources Inc.
summary: Newmac Resources Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral resource properties in Canada. The company primarily holds a 100% interest in the Crazy Fox molybdenum-tungsten property located to the northwest of Little Fort, British Columbia. It is also involved in the design and sale of skin care products in China. Newmac Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
